scripts.build:prod: npm run test && npm run tsc && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.lint: eslint src/main.ts src/App.spec.ts src/router/**/*.ts src/plugins/**/*.ts src/components/**/*.vue src/composables/**/*.ts src/lib/**/*.ts src/types/**/*.ts src/resource-config.ts src/App.vue src/pages/**/*.vue src/pages/**/*.ts src/vite-env.d.ts
